title: Varth
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Varth}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:Varth-RASB.jpg]] |name=Varth |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] **[[Alliance Starfighter Corps/Legends|Alliance Starfighter Corps]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]''[[The Last Command]]'' |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Commander Varth is far more successful at keeping his pilots alive than you are. And, yes, I know Commander Varth has never had to face a Death Star.|Gial Ackbar to Wedge Antilles|''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]''}} [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Varth''' was an [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Wing Commander/Legends|Wing Commander]] who was in charge of the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector's]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] wing. ==Biography== {{Quote|I'm back as part of Commander Varth's wing. While the bulk of the fleet is off chasing Warlord Zsinj, we're being pulled Core-ward to cover some of the sectors where Zsinj used to run around. It's going to be something of an adventure for our people, because we'll be staging from Folor, that moon base orbiting Commenor.|Pash Cracken|}} Varth was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served with the [[Alliance Starfighter Corps/Legends|Alliance Starfighter Corps]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Holding the rank of [[Wing Commander/Legends|Wing Commander]], he was assigned to [[Generis base]], the headquarters of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Atrivis Sector Force]], and was in command of all starfighters in the sector. Varth's position in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] chain-of-command was loosely defined; he was under the command of the local [[Commander-in-Chief/Legends|Commander-in-Chief]], [[Travia Chan/Legends|Travia Chan]], in regards to offensive operations, but was also answerable to Alliance [[Sector Command (Alliance)/Legends|Sector Command]] in regards to the defense of the [[Outer Rim Command Center/Legends|Outer Rim Command Center]]. Additionally, Varth was also under the authority of [[Starfighter Command (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Starfighter Command]] for combined operations with the starfighters from other [[Sector/Legends|sectors]]. Varth's command was officially equipped with a full [[Fighter wing/Legends|fighter wing]] of thirty-six starfighters, but, in reality, only around eighteen were available for operational deployment at any one time. Six fighters were required to be fully armed and fuelled, ready to launch in defense of the base and the Outer Rim Communications Center at a moment's notice. [[Flight group/Legends|Flights]] of starfighters were also constantly being pulled away from Atrivis by Starfighter Command for other operations. Varth's command also suffered from primitive maintenance facilities, and a lack of competent pilots. By [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], Varth's command included [[Cracken Flight Group]], under the command of [[Pash Cracken]].''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' While the majority of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] were [[Hunt for Zsinj|hunting]] for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], Varth and his unit was pulled [[Core Worlds/Legends|coreward]], staging from [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor's]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]], [[Folor]], to protect sectors where Zsinj had operated in.''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], Varth was back in the Atrivis sector, and was present when [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] [[Fall of Generis|assaulted]] Generis. The Imperials captured the Outer Rim Comm Center, but Cracken and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Kryll]] were able to spirit away Travia Chan and her staff. Varth's disposition after the battle was unclear; Cracken hoped he had been able to punch through the assault and hook up with units at either [[Fedje]] or [[Ketaris/Legends|Ketaris]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|What about Varth? Did he make it out?''"
"''I don't know. We lost contact with him during the retreat. I'm still hoping he was able to punch through the other side of the pincer and hook up with one of the units at Fedje or Ketaris.''"
"''He'll make it. He's too contrary to roll over and die just for the Empire's convenience.|Wedge Antilles and Pash Cracken|}} Varth was a bitter individual, taciturn and a strict disciplinarian. He was hated by the pilots under his command, but they tolerated him because, despite his attitude, he was a brilliant soldier and commander, whose tactical prowess kept them alive and victorious against overwhelming odds. ==Skills and abilities== Varth was trained in the use of [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], as well as [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]]. He was also familiar with [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucratic]] procedure, [[Alien/Legends|alien]] languages, and [[Star system/Legends|star systems]]. A skilled pilot, Varth was also able to [[Astrogation/Legends|plot courses]] through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], operate the weapons and [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] systems on larger vessels, and perform repairs and maintenance on starfighters. A brilliant starfighter tactician, his skill kept his pilots alive and winning even when the odds were against them. Varth was also trained in survival techniques, [[Computer/Legends|computer]] programming and repair, application of first aid, and bypassing security equipment.[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] ==Equipment== Varth wore a standard issue Alliance [[Flight suit/Legends|flight suit]], and carried a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'' *[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|pashcracken|Cracken, Pash}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Varth |fi=Varth }} [[Category:Alliance Starfighter Corps personnel]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:New Republic Starfighter Corps personnel]]
